title: salix × hapala
intro: Salix × hapala, also known as the hybrid willow, is a plant hybrid resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Salix × hapala typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's bark, leaves, or roots.
